query: Review the generated documentation site in `dist/docs/html/index.html` for UX and visual quality.
baseline_gaps: Agent may give generic aesthetic feedback without evidence.
expected_behavior: Assesses user intent, hierarchy, visual rhythm, accessibility, and responsive behavior.
Requests or captures screenshots/browser evidence when possible.
Ranks the top issues by user impact.

query: Review the docs navigation and search/discovery experience for a new contributor installing the harness.
baseline_gaps: Agent may ignore keyboard and screen-reader behavior.
Agent may miss navigation states and content discovery states.
expected_behavior: Checks labels, navigation clarity, focus order, keyboard behavior, loading/empty/error states where relevant, and accessible names.
Separates accessibility blockers from visual polish.

query: Evaluate the documentation site's CSS and layout tokens in `docs/assets/site.css` as a design-system surface.
baseline_gaps: Agent may review only visual appearance.
Agent may ignore design-system consistency and regression risk.
expected_behavior: Checks tokens, variants, layout patterns, theming, docs consistency, accessibility states, and regression risk.
Creates or proposes Beads follow-ups for product work.
